name: agent-os
description: Private delivery and software design workflows for durable, cross-device development.

interface.shortDescription: Design and deliver private software tasks safely.
interface.longDescription: Use private tasks as delivery entry points, design clear domains, modules, data, and APIs from repository-owned facts, implement through GitHub without leaking private metadata, and write merged delivery evidence back privately.
defaultPrompt: Complete this private Linear issue through its linked GitHub repository.
Resume this private task from its latest GitHub checkpoint.
Design this software change before implementation using repository-owned project facts.
